parameters.content:
## Human-in-the-Loop (Phase 2)

Aktiviere einen **Telegram Trigger** (Callback Query) + **Wait**-Node:
- User tippt ✅ → Remediation ausführen
- User tippt ❌ → Workflow beenden

Dokumentation: docs/integrations/alerting-n8n-telegram-triage.md

values.content:
=Du bist Homelab-SRE. Analysiere die Pod-Investigation-Daten und bestimme die Grundursache.
Antworte NUR mit gültigem JSON (kein Markdown):

{"root_cause":"OOM|CONFIG_ERROR|IMAGE_ERROR|DEPENDENCY|UNKNOWN","confidence":"high|medium|low","fix_type":"increase_memory|increase_cpu|fix_config|restart_only|none","summary_de":"...","recommended_action":"...","memory_current":"...","memory_suggested":"...","cpu_current":"...","cpu_suggested":"..."}

**Investigation Data:**
{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}

**Original Alert:**
{{ JSON.stringify($("Merge Triage").first().json) }}

Regeln:
- root_cause=OOM wenn termination_reason OOMKilled oder logs OOM/Out of memory zeigen
- root_cause=CONFIG_ERROR wenn logs Config/Parse/Invalid errors zeigen
- root_cause=IMAGE_ERROR wenn events ImagePullBackOff/ErrImagePull zeigen
- root_cause=DEPENDENCY wenn logs connection refused/timeout zu DB/Api zeigen
- confidence=high nur bei klaren Signalen
- fix_type=increase_memory nur bei OOM
- fix_type=increase_cpu nur bei CPUThrottling oder CPU limits zu niedrig
- memory/cpu Angaben mit Einheit (z.B. "256Mi", "500m")
